titleStmt.title: SII 27.119: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 119. (A.R. No. 467 of 1928-29.) SŌMĒŚVARA, MANGALORE TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the west verandah of the prākāra of Sōmanāthēśvara temple.
This damaged record is dated Śaka 13[65], Dundubhi, Chaitra śu. 1, Monday corresponding to 1442 A.D., March 12, f.d.t. ·52. The Śaka year was, however, current.

It record gifts for worship and offerings in and repairs to the temple of god Sōmēśvaradēva when Triyaṁbakadēva-voḍeya was governing Maṅgalūru-rājya. It mentions the royal preceptor Kriyāśaktidēva and seems to refers to gifts by members of several communities like the Baṅgas, Chavuṭas and Chuṅchas. The latter portion of the epigraph is badly damaged and the details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdra cāmara cāravē trailōkyana
garāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣa 13
[65ya] vartamāna duṁdubhi saṁvatsarada cayatra su 1 sō Ū śrī maṁnamahā rājādhirāja
rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa gajabēṁṭekāṟa dēvarāya mahārāyara rājyābhyudaya
kāladalū Ā dēvarāya mahārāyara Āgnāñadhārakarumappa śrīmaṁnmahā pra
ya daṁḍanāyaka voḍeyara nirūpadiṁ triyaṁbaka dēvavoḍeyaru ma
ṁgalūra rājyabhāravanū naḍasikoṁḍu sakaladharṁmaṁgaḷanu paripālisutaṁ yada kāla
dalu maṁgalūra bhūmiya sōmēśvara dēvara Aṁga raṁga bhōganayivē dya keṁduThe letter vē appears to have been engraved above the line in smaller siśe.
śrī manmahā Āvāri da dharmau naḍayutayaralāgi
śrīmadrāya rājaguru mahāmaṁḍalācāriya kriyāśaktidēva voḍeyaru
da Ā sōmēśvara dēvara jīrnnōddhāra Aṁgaraṁgabhōga nayivēdya vāri kṣētramuṁ
Ā caṁdrārkka sthāyiyāgi naḍava mariyādeyali maṁgalūra yatara
ru baṁgaru cauṭaru ttā cuṁca
dēvara A karu pāne maṁgalū
maṁgalūra
damaged
maṁgalūra rājya Arasugaḷige
damaged
śrī pādarasa
śrī sōmēśvara dēvara jīrnnōddhāra Aṁgaraṁgabhōga nayivēdya
damaged
dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānā yōnu pālanaṁ dā
nā pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vāyō ha
vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvarusa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi ma
ṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.119 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
